title: Contrary to claims, Chuck Norris was not a Freemason and received no tribute from the Grand Lodge of Texas
content:
Contrary to claims, Chuck Norris was not a Freemason and received no tribute from the Grand Lodge of Texas. Boatos.org

Hoax – Following the death of Chuck Norris, the Grand Lodge of Texas allegedly paid a posthumous tribute to the actor as a member of the order. Analysis The death of Chuck Norris, confirmed in March 2026 at the age of 86, marked the end of a decades-long iconic career in cinema and martial arts,… Continue a ler »Contrary to claims, Chuck Norris was not a Freemason and received no tribute from the Grand Lodge of Texas

The post Contrary to claims, Chuck Norris was not a Freemason and received no tribute from the Grand Lodge of Texas appeared first on Boatos.org.
